MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mandissa Logan, Esq. 415-398-5398 of Rouda Feder Tietjen McGuinn for Plaintiff.
Coleman Heggi, Esq. 909-307-9370 of Homan & Stone for Defendant JML ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION, INC.through Court Call.

Both sides stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT JML ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION, INC.'s Motion For An Order Compelling Plaintiff Timothy Porter To Further Respond To Defendant Jml Engineering & Construction, Inc.'S Special Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $960.00 Against Plaintiff Timothy Porter And His Attorney Of Record, Mandissa Logan, Esq.

Denied. Plaintiff to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 directly to the Judge Pro Tem at wes@williamshapirolaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Shapiro, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
